title: GetOrderInfoPositionExecution
description: Details of a position execution resulting from the order.

positionId.description: The unique identifier of the executed position.

state.description: The current state of the position. Possible values: open, closed.

investedAmountCurrency.description: The invested amount in the account currency.

initialExposureAccountCurrency.description: The initial exposure in the account currency.

initialExposureAssetCurrency.description: The initial exposure in the asset currency.

addedFunds.description: Additional funds added to the position.

marginAccountCurrency.description: Margin held in the account currency.

marginAssetCurrency.description: Margin held in the asset currency.

stopLossRate.description: The stop-loss rate for the position.

takeProfitRate.description: The take-profit rate for the position.
